nl_query: For each published result, show the script URN, student name, final marks, computation rule, the list of source attempt types used, the evaluator names for those attempts, and whether the result has been reconciled with ERP.
failed_sql: SELECT r.id, a.urn, sc.name AS student_name, r.final_marks, r.computation_rule, ARRAY(SELECT ea.attempt_type FROM evaluation_attempt ea WHERE ea.script_id = a.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE AND ea.status = 'FROZEN' ORDER BY ea.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS source_attempt_types, fc.name AS evaluator_name, r.erp_push_status FROM result r JOIN answer_script a ON r.script_id = a.id JOIN student_cache sc ON a.student_id = sc.id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON ea.faculty_cache_id = fc.id WHERE r.erp_push_status = 'RECONCILED' ORDER BY r.final_marks DESC LIMIT 100;
